# Key Findings (auto-generated)

Factual rollup of the current feature dataset. Interpretation lives in the final report.

## Overview
- Posts: 19,639 across 2 platforms (youtube: 17,764, instagram: 1,875).
- Content date range: 2017-05-08 to 2026-07-12.

## Sentiment by platform (English)
- instagram: positive 85.6%, neutral 7.6%, negative 6.8%.
- youtube: positive 64.6%, neutral 20.8%, negative 14.6%.

## Engagement vs sentiment
- Avg engagement percentile by sentiment: negative 0.491, neutral 0.5, positive 0.508 (spread 0.017).
- Relationship is essentially flat (sentiment does not predict engagement).

## Dominant topics (by volume)
- T0: business, time, start, help - 13,474 posts.
- T4: understand, easy, easy understand, simple - 842 posts.
- T1: course, completed, complete, free course - 643 posts.
- T5: free, free praise, praise, paid - 556 posts.
- T2: clear, wish, understandable, clear understandable - 493 posts.

## Emerging vs declining topics (recent vs earlier in window)
- Rising: T0: business, time, start, help (+9.08 pts).
- Rising: T3: chat, gpt, chat gpt, voice (+0.28 pts).
- Rising: T5: free, free praise, praise, paid (-1.5 pts).
- Declining: T2: clear, wish, understandable, clear understandable (-3.02 pts).
- Declining: T4: understand, easy, easy understand, simple (-3.24 pts).

## Top keywords (by volume)
- ChatGPT - 3,663 posts.
- Automation - 2,317 posts.
- AI Agents - 1,951 posts.
- Startup - 1,916 posts.
- Digital Marketing - 1,695 posts.

## Models
- Production sentiment model: vader (deploy-domain macro-F1 0.6493).
- Topic model: NMF, k=6, UMass coherence -0.3958 (more coherent than LDA).
